spec_match.rationale: Concept exercises the relevant API surface (fetch(, navigator., window.) with runtime script (~8008 chars) wired to live controls, in line with the feature summary.

interactive.rationale: Effectively no live controls — does not clear the interactivity bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept lede matches the feature-index promise on key terms (migration, navigation, transferring).

edge_cases.rationale: Some failure / fallback handling shown (2 hits), but the demo skews toward the happy path and doesn't surface most edge cases the spec calls out.

references.rationale: References section cites the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> link directly.

design_system.rationale: All colours come via 112 CSS-variable references, no raw hex, no button background override without a colour override, and not a static-card pattern.

openQuestions.title: Add live controls and a runtime hook
openQuestions.detail: Page must offer at least a try-it button that invokes the API and shows its return value or visible side effect; current state is closer to a static card.

openQuestions.title: Demo at least one explicit failure or edge case
openQuestions.detail: Spec / chromestatus motivation mentions failure modes worth showing — permission denial, missing-feature, empty input, malformed payload. Add a control or scripted scenario that walks the user through one and shows the resulting error or fallback.

openQuestions.title: Manually verify against the spec text
openQuestions.detail: Reviewer-v1-subagent based the spec_match verdict on the chromestatus summary ("When a user installs a Progressive Web App (PWA), its identity and security context are tightly bound to its web origin, for example, `app.example.com`. This presents a significant challenge for developers who need to change their PWA's ori") because reading the full spec for every concept was out of budget. A human or follow-up agent should diff the demo's actual behaviour against https://github.com/WICG/manifest-incubations/pull/136 to catch anything chromestatus glossed over.

summary: Concept ships ~8008 chars of script across 1 button(s) and 0 other control(s). hits 4 pass / 1 partial / 1 fail across the six rubric criteria.
